ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response attempts to be calm and guiding but lacks urgency in tone, which is inconsistent with the persona of a Healer who would prioritize immediate action.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>Short note: The response acknowledges gravity but fails to address urgency and context, showing poor relevance in the current situation of a lockdown due to an alarm.
